title: Using the product and quotient rules
problem: Simplify $7^5 \times 7^3 \div 7^4$. Give your answer as a power of $7$.

steps.instruction: Apply the product rule to the multiplication.
Apply the quotient rule to the division.

title: Using the power of a power rule with the quotient rule
problem: Simplify $(4^3)^2 \div 4^5$. Give your answer as a power of $4$.

steps.instruction: Apply the power of a power rule.

title: Combining all three index laws
problem: Simplify $\dfrac{(6^2)^3 \times 6^4}{6^3 \times 6^5}$. Give your answer as a power of $6$.

steps.instruction: Apply the power of a power rule to $(6^2)^3$.
Apply the product rule to the numerator.
Apply the product rule to the denominator.
